scripts.check: npm run gate:core-architecture && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.check:strict: npm run check && npm run test:coverage
scripts.test: vitest run --pool threads --exclude apps/cli/src/composition.test.ts --exclude apps/cli/src/source-bootstrap-entrypoints.test.ts --exclude packages/core/src/adapters/process-callback-runner.test.ts && vitest run apps/cli/src/composition.test.ts apps/cli/src/source-bootstrap-entrypoints.test.ts packages/core/src/adapters/process-callback-runner.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --pool threads --coverage --exclude apps/cli/src/composition.test.ts --exclude apps/cli/src/source-bootstrap-entrypoints.test.ts --exclude packages/core/src/adapters/process-callback-runner.test.ts && vitest run apps/cli/src/composition.test.ts apps/cli/src/source-bootstrap-entrypoints.test.ts packages/core/src/adapters/process-callback-runner.test.ts
scripts.smoke:discord:regression: AGORA_DEV_REGRESSION_MODE=true npm run build && tsx scripts/smoke-discord-regression.ts
scripts.smoke:discord:web-query: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/smoke-discord-web-query.ts
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -k -n build,server -c auto "npm run dev:build:watch" "npm run dev:server:app"
scripts.dev:cli: concurrently -k -n build,cli -c auto "npm run dev:build:watch" "npm run dev:cli:app"
